LAUNCHING AND SELLING
1. Introduction
пғҳ Ground Rules:
пӮ· Focus on Seed Launch
пӮ· Contribute and participate in the community
пӮ· Recordings and goodies are being posted in the members area
пӮ· IвҖҷll answer questions towards the end of the call
пӮ· I need you to participate - on the calls and between the calls
пӮ· Respect the ecosystem
2. ItвҖҷs time to Launch
пғҳ Your Seed Product is a вҖңliveвҖқ training... high perceived value
пғҳ Your Seed Product provides coaching... the easiest sale
пғҳ You have people on your list who have been waiting to buy from you
пғҳ YouвҖҷve got a proven formula
3. Selling Your Seed Launch
3.1 The вҖңShot Across The BowвҖқ
пӮ· The shot across the bow within the context of your launch is a warning
пӮ· ItвҖҷs a way of letting people know that something is coming.
пӮ· ItвҖҷs basically a way of telling people that something is coming without asking
for the sale.
3.1.1 Two Different Models
пғҳ The вҖңClassicвҖқ
пӮ· It starts with a simple email...
пӮ· The Survey
пғҳ The вҖңCall for Case StudiesвҖқ
пӮ· Call to action
пӮ· The Survey
3.1.2 The вҖңShot Across The BowвҖқ Checklist
пғҳ Friendly
пғҳ Establishes authority
пғҳ Arouses curiosity
пғҳ Seeks feedback
пғҳ DoesnвҖҷt sell
пғҳ People support that which
пғҳ they help create...

3.2 The Prelaunch
пғҳ This isnвҖҷt the full out PLF style prelaunch; itвҖҷs actually a lot simpler.
пғҳ One piece of Prelaunch Content (PLC) is generally sufficient
пғҳ Keep it simple.
пғҳ This example uses a video, but you could do it via a blog post or even an email.
(The message is whatвҖҷs important, not the media.)
пғҳ If youвҖҷve got advanced skills and you want to be more elaborate, then feel free
пғҳ If youвҖҷre a beginner, stick to the program!
3.2.1 The Prelaunch Checklist
пғҳ Establishes authority
пғҳ Provides value
пғҳ Paints a brighter future (shows possibility of transformation)
пғҳ Foreshadows offer
3.2.2 The Prelaunch Triggers
пғҳ Authority
пғҳ Likeability
пғҳ Social Proof
пғҳ Scarcity
3.2.3 Launch List or Not? (Optional)
пғҳ If you havenвҖҷt launched before and your current list is closely in
alignment with Seed Launch offer, do NOT use a launch list.
пғҳ If the Seed Launch is a different type offer to why they joined your list,
then use a Launch List.
3.2.4 Transcripts
3.2.5 Prelaunch Video
пғҳ The call to action was to opt-in to the launch list.
3.2.6 Prelaunch Content вҖ“ Intro
пғҳ The Intro
пӮ· Intro and Definition
пӮ· Mention your Shot Across the Bow and Social Proof
пғҳ The Content
пғҳ Transition to the Close
пғҳ The Offer Preview
пғҳ The Call to Action (CTA)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 5 --

3.2.7 Prelaunch Content вҖ“ Content
пғҳ вҖңI wanted to answer some questionsвҖқ
пғҳ Five parts of the Seed Launch (mention Case Study)
пғҳ Primary objectives (transformation)
пӮ· EXAMPLE: First piece: get the list
пӮ· EXAMPLE: Second piece: figure out what the offer is
пӮ· EXAMPLE: Third piece is making the sale
пӮ· EXAMPLE: Fourth piece is product delivery
пӮ· EXAMPLE: Fifth piece is taking it forward
пғҳ REMEMBER: itвҖҷs about the transformation
3.2.8 Prelaunch Content вҖ“ Transition to Close
пғҳ ItвҖҷs awesome
пғҳ Who itвҖҷs for (beginners and advanced)
пғҳ IвҖҷve been teaching for a long time (Authority trigger)
пғҳ People have been asking me (the Reluctant Hero)
3.2.9 Prelaunch Content вҖ“ The Offer Preview
пғҳ Focused (not a huge course, deep dive, specialized training)
пғҳ Rough deliverables (five calls, interactive, live questions, coaches)
пғҳ Who itвҖҷs for (high level or just starting out)
пғҳ Rough agenda (a very quick description of the calls, this is optional)
пғҳ Pricing foreshadow (not going to be inexpensive)
3.2.10 Prelaunch Content вҖ“ the CTA
пғҳ Opt-in form
пғҳ Sales Process foreshadow (not a fancy launch, join the list and IвҖҷll contact
you)
пғҳ Scarcity (most spots are already filled)
пғҳ Instructions (go ahead and put your email address in)
пғҳ Reclose (seed launches are awesome, put in your email address)
3.3 The Sale
пғҳ This is where you close the sale... and enroll your new clients into your program
3.3.1 Your Sales Process
пғҳ The sales video or sales letter can be shorter than typical
пғҳ Keep it simple.
пғҳ This example uses a video, but you could do it via a standard sales letter.
(Although for most people, the video will actually be easier.)
пғҳ If youвҖҷve got advanced skills and you want to be more elaborate, then
feel free
пғҳ If youвҖҷre a beginner, stick to the program!
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 5 --

3.3.2 The вҖңSaleвҖқ Checklist
пғҳ Remember, youвҖҷre selling the transformation... not the stuff
пғҳ Authority
пғҳ Scarcity
пғҳ This is for you if...
пғҳ Strong presentation of price
пғҳ Risk Reversal
пғҳ Call to Action
пғҳ Be STRONG... before you create, think about all the lives you are
пғҳ going to impact. Get clear on the value you are creating.
3.3.3 The Sale вҖ“ Intro
пғҳ This is for you if...
пғҳ Transformation
пғҳ Authority
3.3.4 The Sale вҖ“ Body
пғҳ Remember: youвҖҷre focusing on вҖңthe transformationвҖқ
пғҳ My example:
пӮ· Get the list
пӮ· Nail the offer
пӮ· Making the sale
пӮ· Deliver the product
пӮ· Moving forward
пӮ· You can model what I do...
пӮ· Interaction
пӮ· Community
3.3.5 The Sale вҖ“ Transition to the Close
пғҳ This is obviously for you (assume the close)
пғҳ Scarcity
пғҳ Not PLF (answer objection, clarify offer)
пғҳ This is how itвҖҷs going to work (small group)
3.3.6 The Sale вҖ“ the Close, Part 1
пғҳ Presentation of price
пӮ· Small group and price anchoring ($17k to $32k)
пӮ· Present price with reason why
пӮ· Instructions (CTA)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 5 --

3.3.7 The Sale вҖ“ the Close, Part 2
пғҳ Risk Reversal
пӮ· The guarantee (30 days or longer)
пӮ· Instructions (CTA)
3.3.8 The Sale вҖ“ the Close, Part 3
пғҳ Bonuses
пӮ· Focus on benefits and the transformation
пӮ· You could also put bonuses right after the Presentation of Price
and BEFORE the Risk Reversal.
3.3.9 The Sale вҖ“ the Close, Part 4
пғҳ Reclose
пӮ· Scarcity
пӮ· Transformation (again!)
пӮ· Instructions (CTA)
пӮ· End with an assumption of the close
3.4 Emails
3.4.1 In general, keep your emails short and sweet
3.4.2 Always know the goal of each email, and make sure every word of the email
is written with that goal in mind
3.4.3 Deep Dive training. You can use those emails as a model for your emails.
3.5 The Deadline
3.5.1 You absolutely need a hard deadline for your launch... you have to close
down your sales process
3.5.2 Half of your orders will come in on closing day
3.5.3 You ABSOLUTELY need to send two emails on you closing day (if you donвҖҷt do
this you will lose approximately 25% of your sales)
3.5.4 Make the deadline at midnight (in the U.S. use midnight EST or PST)
3.5.5 Go get вҖҳem!!
4. Module 4 Homework
пғҳ REMEMBER! This is about progress, not perfection!
пғҳ REMEMBER! None of this is set in stone... you can change your mind at any time!
пғҳ Create an outline (a simple outline - just use bullet points) of your sales video (or
sales letter) and post it to the community
пғҳ Participate in the community by giving feedback and encouragement
www.getwsodownload.com
